title: MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `exp_subtype()`
description:
MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `exp_subtype()`.

It can be reproduced on the docker image `monetdb/monetdb:Mar2025-SP1` and `monetdb/dev-builds:default`.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table1 (column1 VARCHAR, column2 INT, column3 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TABLE table2 (columnA VARCHAR NOT NULL, columnB INT CHECK (columnB > 0));
INSERT INTO table1 (column1, column2, column3) VALUES ('test', 5, NULL);
CREATE TABLE table1_partitioned AS SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE column2 IN (4, 5, 6);
key_bug_features: Crashes at exp_subtype() function in MonetDB
